testcase.name: testStudentIdentity
testcase.system-out: ================================= Test ID : ST01 Operation : Validate Student ID Input : studentId=s225504843 Expected : Student ID should not be null Actual : s225504843 =================================

testcase.name: testR2_EmptyUsernameWrongPassword
testcase.system-out: ================================= Test ID : R2 Operation : Login Input : username=null, password=xyz Expected : loginSuccess=false, errorMsg=Empty Username Actual : LoginStatus [loginSuccess=false, errorMsg=Empty Username] =================================

testcase.name: testR6_WrongUsernameCorrectPassword
testcase.system-out: ================================= Test ID : R6 Operation : Login Input : username=abc, password=ahsan_pass Expected : loginSuccess=false, errorMsg=Credential mismatch Actual : LoginStatus [loginSuccess=false, errorMsg=Credential mismatch] =================================
